storyHook: 选片播放，暂停讨论，看完评价

narrative.when: 周五晚上九点，一周工作结束
narrative.where: 甲家客厅，沙发前的屏幕
narrative.who: 甲（观众）· 乙（一起看的朋友/家人）
narrative.how: 选好节目后一起观看，中途暂停聊几句
narrative.method: 选片播放、观看中途讨论情节、看完互相评价、关掉屏幕
narrative.event: 甲一周没看新节目，今晚终于有空看完一整集

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have not seen a new play for a week.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, what did you get?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This one, it looks good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, let us start now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I will put it on.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here is your tea.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. Here we go.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The first song is quite good.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is. Let us see the first bit.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quiet now, it is starting.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This is a good start.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the picture is clear.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I like the way they put the story.
turns.zh: 我喜欢他们讲故事的方式。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is not too quick.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us see what comes after.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you see that? He is in a hard place.
turns.zh: 你看到没？他处境挺难的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, but he made his bed.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: True, but the other side is not right.
turns.zh: 话是这么说，但对方也不地道。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What would you do if you were him?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would keep to the first idea.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good point. But look at her face.
turns.zh: 有道理。但你瞧她那表情。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: She is not happy with what he took.
turns.zh: 她不太满意他选的东西。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have a feeling she will do something.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us see? Put on play.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, here we go again.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, look at that!

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What? That box?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it was in the first picture too.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So it is a sign of something.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He may open it after a time.
turns.zh: 可能他过一会儿会打开它。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Or she will. She saw it first.
turns.zh: 或者她来开。她先看到的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: True. She gave him a look.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would say she is the one in control.
turns.zh: 我觉得她才是掌控局面的人。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us see if I am right.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put on play again.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, here we go. The end is coming.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, that was sudden. Did you see that?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I did not see it coming. Good twist.
turns.zh: 看到了，没想到。反转不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: But the last bit was a bit quick.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quite right. A good watch for a night off.
turns.zh: 没错。休息的晚上看挺好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Still, I would have liked more time with the others.
turns.zh: 不过，我还是希望多给其他人一点时间。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, they were interesting but not used enough.
turns.zh: 对，他们挺有意思的，但没怎么用上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Was the music too loud at times?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It took away the quiet bits.
turns.zh: 它把安静的时刻给盖住了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The night views were well done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Same here. The light was soft and good.
turns.zh: 我也是。光线柔和，效果不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Would you watch it again?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not now. But in a year or two, yes.
turns.zh: 现在不会。不过一两年后会的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is right. I will look for the one after this.
turns.zh: 有道理。我会留意后面的那集。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us have one more drink before bed.
turns.zh: 睡觉前我们再来一杯吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us see what comes after this.
turns.zh: 我们看看之后会发生什么。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, but first, that bit with the key was strange.
turns.zh: 好，但首先，那个钥匙的片段有点奇怪。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I thought it was a sign for what comes after.
turns.zh: 我觉得那是为后面埋的伏笔。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That might be true. Or a trick to make us see that.
turns.zh: 也许吧。或者是让我们这么想的把戏。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The old face said he had more knowledge.
turns.zh: 那张老脸说明他知道得更多。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He gave nothing away. Good acting.
turns.zh: 他什么也没透露。演得好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like to see his back story.
turns.zh: 我想看看他的背景故事。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: They will put it in after, I am certain.
turns.zh: 他们后面会交代的，我肯定。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is the girl safe now?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not with that man after her. Let us see.
turns.zh: 有那个人追着她，不安全。我们看吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right then, I am ready for the end.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, play it. I would like to see the end.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here we go. Quiet now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh! That was sudden. Did you see that?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, the man in the dark. He had a knife.
turns.zh: 看到了，暗处那个人。他拿了把刀。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: So the girl is in danger again. Not safe at all.
turns.zh: 所以女孩又危险了。根本不安全。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I thought she was safe. This story keeps changing.
turns.zh: 我以为她安全了。这故事一直在变。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is what makes it good. You do not see what comes.
turns.zh: 这才好看。你猜不到后面。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. But I hope she gets away in the end.
turns.zh: 也是。但我希望她最后能脱身。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We will see. One more minute and we will get the news.
turns.zh: 等着瞧吧。再看一分钟就知道了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Keep going?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, play it. I need to see.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: There, the door is open. Who is that?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A friend? No, the walk is wrong.
turns.zh: 朋友？不对，走路姿势不对。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, he has a key. That is not good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: She is in the sleeping room. Does she get the sound?
turns.zh: 她在卧室。她听到声音了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not now. She has music on.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: This is a bit tight. I would look under the bed.
turns.zh: 这有点紧张。我会看看床底下。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Quiet! He is in the room now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: She sees him! What will she do?
turns.zh: 她看见他了！她会怎么做？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: She is not moving. Is she in fear?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, she is waiting to see what he does.
turns.zh: 不，她在等着看他做什么。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He has a knife. That is a bad sign.
turns.zh: 他拿着刀。那可不是好兆头。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: She will take a thing from the table.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, a light. Good idea.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: But he is stronger. She may not get it in time.
turns.zh: 但他力气更大。她可能来不及拿到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: She is quick. Watch her eyes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He comes near. This is the top point.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: She has it! Now she will make a move.
turns.zh: 她拿到了！现在她要行动了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I hope she gets away. But the door is shut.
turns.zh: 我希望她逃掉。但门关着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: She is out. That was a good bit.
turns.zh: 她出来了。那段拍得不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, but the end was too quick.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would have made it longer.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. The music was good.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Quite. I will get the one after this one in a week.
turns.zh: 没错。一周后我接着看下一集。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Turn it off?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I am done for the night.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That was a good end to the week.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Enjoy the film.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You too. Talk tomorrow.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the box to rest.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. That was a good watch.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I am happy we saw it together.
turns.zh: 嗯。很高兴我们一起看了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Me too. You were right.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take the cups to the cooking room.
turns.zh: 我把杯子拿到烹饪室去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me give you a hand.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No need. I have them.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then I will get the lights.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do not be long. The bed is waiting.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Two minutes. Good night.

storyBlurb: 周五夜，甲终于有空看完一整集新剧。乙陪看，暂停讨论，结局评价，屏幕暗下时一周的疲惫也消散。
storyScript:
【开场·选片播放】周五晚上九点，甲窝在沙发里，手指在屏幕上来回划动，终于点开一部攒了一周的剧。乙端着两杯热茶坐下，屏幕亮起，片头曲流淌在安静的客厅里。甲按播放键，画面展开，两人不约而同地调整了坐姿，目光锁定在屏幕上。

【进行·观看讨论】剧情过半，主角陷入两难抉择，甲突然按下暂停键，转头看向乙：你觉得他会怎么选？乙皱眉想了想，指着画面里一个细节说，你看这里，其实早有暗示。两人你一言我一语，争论着角色动机，茶水在杯里渐渐变温。甲笑着摇头，又按播放键，画面继续流动，但讨论的余温还在空气里。

【进行·观看讨论】结尾高潮处，反转来得猝不及防，乙倒吸一口气，甲忍不住拍了下沙发扶手。屏幕暗下，片尾字幕滚动，两人沉默了几秒。甲先开口：这结局有点意思，但总觉得少了点什么。乙点头：是啊，前面铺垫那么多，最后收得太急。他们交换着看法，从剧情聊到拍摄手法，像在完成一次小小的影评仪式。

【收束·结束评价】甲拿起遥控器关掉屏幕，客厅陷入短暂的黑暗，只有窗外路灯的光透进来。乙伸了个懒腰，说下周继续看下一集。甲嗯了一声，心里觉得这一周的疲惫好像都随着片尾曲飘走了。他们收拾杯子，关灯，各自回房，屏幕的余温留在沙发上，等着下一个周五。
